# leifwind_entity (Resource)

A leifwind metadata entity. project_id and name are immutable (changes force replacement).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "leifwind_entity" "book" {
  project_id = leifwind_project.library.id
  name       = "book"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Entity name (unique per project).
- `project_id` (String) Owning project id (UUID).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Server-assigned object id (UUID).
- `unique_key` (String) Server-computed natural key.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import leifwind_entity.book <project_id>/<entity_id>
```
